# EMORI

> EMORI is a hosted macOS 26+ userland bootstrap script and Codex plugin bundle for the EMORI persona and `@emoriwan`.

EMORI owns non-admin user-space bootstrap: Homebrew dependencies, dotfiles, Git and SSH identity or access material, OpenClaw onboarding, and Codex plugin assets. Privileged machine prep such as Homebrew prefix permissions, classic SSH hardening, Tailscale, and headless Mac settings belongs to AgentBox before EMORI runs.

The hosted script delegates generic package, SSH-key, and dotfile application work to Bootbox. Use `boot.sh --help` for the current wrapper options and environment-variable contract.

## Primary Resources

- [Hosted boot script](https://emori.boot.tanaab.sh/boot.sh): The generated shell entrypoint for bootstrapping the EMORI macOS user.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/tanaabased/emori): Source code, README, workflows, examples, and plugin assets.
- [README](https://github.com/tanaabased/emori#readme): Human setup, usage, manual setup, and development guidance.
- [Releases](https://github.com/tanaabased/emori/releases): Published release tags and plugin archives.
- [Issues](https://github.com/tanaabased/emori/issues): Bug reports, regressions, and feature requests.
- [AgentBox](https://github.com/tanaabased/agentbox): Privileged macOS machine-prep layer expected before EMORI.
- [Bootbox](https://github.com/tanaabased/bootbox): Generic macOS bootstrap layer used by EMORI.
- [Tanaab canon](https://github.com/tanaabased/canon): Shared Tanaab plugin, skill, and project canon materialized by EMORI unless disabled.
